name: Three Houses RPG
description:
"Another decade of Three Houses discourse."

Trying something a little different here. You'll notice the complete and utter lack of tokens. I'm using a lorebook for the first time, and I wanted to stress test it with a TH RPG, cause why not? Using Janitor, and it seems to be working perfectly fine.

Keep in mind, I haven't hard coded in what happens, so you'll have to guide the bot into the story, if that's what you want to do. Or you could let it make some bullshit up for you.

Anyways, you'll be playing the role of a student, or possibly even a professor yourself. All of the students have been aged up to 18, to not have to deal with Janitor smacking me upside the head. I thought about maybe making a Byleth POV, but couldn't figure out a way for that to work out, without the bot talking for user.
creator: Namyks
